panel.title: Fase 1 - Reconocimiento: escaneo externo buscando Exchange vulnerable

search.query: index=proxylogon sourcetype=iis sc_status=403 cs_uri_stem="/autodiscover/autodiscover.xml" | table _time c_ip cs_uri_stem sc_status | sort _time

index=proxylogon sourcetype=iis (cs_uri_stem="*autodiscover*" OR cs_uri_stem="*/ecp/*") (cs_uri_query="*@*" OR cs_Cookie="*X-AnonResource-Backend*" OR cs_Cookie="*X-BEResource*") | lookup hafnium_ips src_ip AS c_ip OUTPUT isBad AS ip_conocida_hafnium | table _time c_ip ip_conocida_hafnium cs_uri_stem cs_uri_query sc_status time_taken | sort _time

index=proxylogon sourcetype=iis ((cs_uri_stem="/ecp/proxyLogon.ecp" cs_method=POST) OR (cs_uri_stem="/owa/auth/help.aspx" cs_method=GET)) | table _time c_ip cs_method cs_uri_stem sc_status time_taken | sort _time

panel.title: Fase 4 - Comando y Control: Ejecucion via Webshell (w3wp.exe genera cmd/powershell)

search.query: index=proxylogon sourcetype=windows_events_proxylogon EventCode=4688 ParentProcessName="*w3wp.exe*" | table _time Computer NewProcessName ParentProcessName CommandLine | sort _time

panel.title: Fase 5a - Acciones sobre objetivos: Exportacion de buzon (New-MailboxExportRequest)

search.query: index=proxylogon sourcetype=windows_events_proxylogon EventCode=4104 ScriptBlockText="*New-MailboxExportRequest*" | table _time Computer ScriptBlockText

panel.title: Fase 5b - Acciones sobre objetivos: Acceso a LSASS (volcado de credenciales)

search.query: index=proxylogon sourcetype=windows_events_proxylogon EventCode=10 TargetProcessName="*lsass.exe*" NOT SourceProcessName IN ("*MsMpEng.exe*", "*procexp*", "*Taskmgr.exe*") | table _time Computer SourceProcessName TargetProcessName GrantedAccess

panel.title: Fase 5c - Acciones sobre objetivos: Exfiltracion (descarga del .pst via webshell)

search.query: index=proxylogon sourcetype=iis cs_uri_stem="*.pst" | table _time c_ip cs_method cs_uri_stem sc_status time_taken | sort _time

panel.title: Linea de tiempo completa del ataque (correlacion de las 2 fuentes)

search.query: index=proxylogon (sourcetype=iis (c_ip="103.77.192.219" OR sc_status=403)) OR (sourcetype=windows_events_proxylogon (ParentProcessName="*w3wp.exe*" OR EventCode=4104 OR EventCode=10)) | eval evento=case( sc_status=403, "1. Reconocimiento (escaneo externo)", match(cs_uri_query,"@"), "2. SSRF Autodiscover (explotacion)", cs_uri_stem="/ecp/proxyLogon.ecp", "3. Escritura webshell (POST /ecp/)", cs_uri_stem="/owa/auth/help.aspx" AND cs_method="GET", "3. Acceso al webshell (GET)", cs_uri_stem="/owa/auth/help.aspx" AND cs_method="POST", "4. Comando via webshell", EventCode=4688, "4. Ejecucion en host (w3wp -> cmd/powershell)", EventCode=4104, "5a. Exportacion de buzon", EventCode=10, "5b. Acceso a LSASS", match(cs_uri_stem,"\.pst$"), "5c. Exfiltracion (.pst)", 1=1, "Otro") | table _time evento sourcetype c_ip CommandLine ScriptBlockText | sort _time

panel.title: Validacion cruzada: mismo patron en ejecucion REAL del exploit (dataset publico OTRF)

search.query: index=proxylogon sourcetype=json_otrf_real EventID=1 ParentImage="*w3wp*" | table TimeCreated Hostname Image ParentImage CommandLine | sort TimeCreated
